'''Cian Marook''' was a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] of the [[Hrasskis (species)|Hrasskis]] species.

==Biography==
Elected to the [[New Republic Senate/Legends|New Republic Senate]] in [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]] and had emerged as a Senate leader by [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]]. During the [[Senate Defense Council/Legends|Defense Council's]] discussion of [[Operation Hammerblow]], Marook was the first Senator to openly question the decision to place [[General/Legends|General]] [[Etahn A'baht]] as the [[New Republic Fifth Fleet|Fifth Battle Group's]] [[Commanding officer/Legends|commanding officer]]. Based on the Hrasskis concept of promotion through seniority, he saw A'baht, a relative newcomer to the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic Defense Force]], as an inferior choice to a commander with greater [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] ties. Marook also viewed A'baht's experience with the [[Dornean Navy]] as limited due to its relatively small size.

Following the diversionary negotiations between [[Nil Spaar]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]], Marook was one of three Senators who supported Spaar's position, although he did not flee [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] after the [[Viceroy/Legends|Viceroy]].

==Behind the scenes==
His name is first misspelled as "Cion Marook" in ''Before the Storm''.
